prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to england and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document relates to the Crown Prosecution Service (CPS), which operates in England and is responsible for prosecuting criminal cases. As the CPS's response and guidance pertain to improving handling of stalking cases within English jurisdiction, it specifically applies to England.
